About Freedom
My Freedom
Explore a career with us.
Search Job Opportunities
Why Freedom?

We’re proud to be leaders in a movement that brings affordability to Canadians. We not only provide the wireless freedom Canadians want, but the wireless freedom they deserve!

We’re always on the lookout for go-getters that are committed to disrupting the status quo.

Working at Freedom.

Our culture reflects our mission to challenge the status quo. People who work at Freedom thrive on change and feel a connection to our core values.

We are an inclusive team and believe that diversity of thought & perspective enriches our culture and fosters innovation.

Branded Dealer Opportunity.

Looking to become an Authorized Freedom Mobile Dealer? Email us to learn more and get started.

Email us at dealerinfo@freedommobile.ca
What we Offer.

In addition to exciting career opportunities and a dynamic work environment, we also offer a full range of rewards.

Financial Rewards

Our competitive total compensation plan recognizes & rewards high performance. Our employees get access to a generous share purchase program, retirement plans, and discounts on our products & services.

Health & Well-being

Our wellness programs are designed to support our diverse workforce. We offer an extensive flexible benefits program to meet the needs of our employees and their eligible family members.

Learning & Development
